programmes.show_description: Detailed weather forecast.
BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.
The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.
13/15. It's training day for the park's youngest camel, and a new era begins in Wolf Wood.
9/15. Rescue teams race to save an elderly horse trapped in mud, arson takes a heavy toll on farms, and Paul Colgan explores pioneering technology that could save lives in rural areas.
14/15. A specialist illegal money-lending team works with Billy Billingham and the police to identify, track down and raid a suspected loan shark.
Broadcasting icon Sarah Greene teams up with Jacqui to explore a three-bedroom terrace in Northampton, where the work is already underway.
Today's Bargain Hunt with Christina Trevanion comes from Peterborough, with experts Catherine Southon and Kate Bliss. Christina discovers the origins of the humble jigsaw puzzle.

programmes.show_name: BBC News at One including Reporting Scotland
programmes.show_description: The latest national and international news from the BBC.
12/12. Roman Kemp aims to convince 25-year-old sports fanatic Kerry, who dreams of becoming a Paralympian, that the humble beetroot may help her to achieve her goal.
2/20. Izzie and Robin help Nina sell her late mum's antiques to fund essential house renovations. A painting by a renowned artist sparks intense interest on auction day.
40/55. Ginny Buckley is in the Wye Valley with a couple whose move is fuelled by a desire to be closer to their grandchildren.
3/10. Dom revisits coppersmith Roy and jeweller Sarah, who have achieved life-changing success and finds out the amazing amounts they are earning after visiting his business bootcamp.
7/30. Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed.
2/47. Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Tom Allen for the quiz where contestants try to score as few points as possible by coming up with the answers no-one else could think of.
The latest national and international news from the BBC.
The latest news and weather from BBC News Scotland. Presented by Laura Goodwin.

programmes.show_name: Party Election Broadcast by the Scottish Labour Party
programmes.show_description: A party election broadcast by the Scottish Labour party.
Karen takes matters into her own hands to help a desperate Alex.
The verdict in Jasmine's trial is read, Vicki shares her hesitations, and Elaine and Ian hold their campaign launch events.
2/9. Leaving the tranquillity of Kefalonia behind, the teams race through Greece to reach one of Europe's biggest and most vibrant cities, Istanbul, where Europe and Asia collide.
11/12. It's week 11, and the final five candidates must pass a gruelling round of interviews with some of Britain's toughest interviewers. Only two can make it through to the grand final.
The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.
The latest news and weather from BBC News Scotland.
1/2. A Welsh fishing village finds itself at the centre of a massive drug smuggling ring.
2/2. The investigation widens to Lebanon, the Isle of Man and Spain as the detectives close in on the smuggling gang.
Conversation about Scotland's biggest news stories, hosted by Martin Geissler.
Detailed weather forecast.
BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.
The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.
14/15. The keepers are celebrating a very special birthday. Maleika, the old dame of the lion pride, is celebrating her 18th, and Kate and the keepers have a very special surprise for her.
10/15. Wildfire threatens farms and livestock in Antrim, police in North Yorkshire hunt criminals targeting badgers on farmland, and Paul Colgan explores rural policing in Hertfordshire.
15/15. Ex-SAS leader Billy Billingham is out on the beat with Cleveland Police, going after violent criminals, thieves and antisocial behaviour in the local community.
70/80. We're celebrating 20 years of Homes Under the Hammer with a trip to the capital! Featuring properties in Shepherd's Bush, Chelsea and Manchester.
Eric Knowles hitches a lift with a host of experts and their red and blue teams as they journey to antiques fairs in search of car-related collectibles to sell at auction.

6/10. A royal visit to Kembleford is jeopardised when a school janitor with a mysterious past is found murdered. Can Father Brown save the day from being cancelled?
It's an island escape as Jules Hudson helps a couple from a town in Cheshire to find their dream home on Anglesey.
4/10. Dom revisits Alex and Lucinda, who have made serious money from their talents.
8/30. Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed.

programmes.show_name: Party Election Broadcast by the Scottish Greens
programmes.show_description: A party election broadcast by the Scottish Green party.
Alex Jones and JB Gill bring you the stories that matter from across the country.
2/26. Fifty years on from a fire at Inveraray Castle, Dougie finds out how it was rescued.
3/6. When a member of her Morris team is targeted mid-performance, Margo is just as shocked as the audience. But with all eyes on the dancers, how was the victim attacked in plain sight?

programmes.show_name: Have I Got News for You
programmes.show_description: 2/10. Monty Don hosts, with guest panellists comedian Chris McCausland and journalist Helen Lewis joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop.
2/6. The lads decide it's time to expand their empire in Cork city. Their days of doing all the hard work are over - they plan on being the bosses now. Contains some strong language.
The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.
The latest news and weather from BBC News Scotland.
Claudia is joined by actors Ralph Fiennes, Anna Faris, Olivia Cooke and comedian Michelle de Swarte.
15/18. Every ounce of Scottish football from the SPFL to the Sunday league ringers. It means everything, it means nothing, and this is the view of the fans on the terrace.
